description_long: This is a round, squat plastic lotion bottle with a dark brown, wood-textured body and a black screw-on cap. The front label features a circular design with the brand and product name in white and gold, set against the brown background. The bottle has a smooth, glossy finish and a slightly flattened profile, making it easy to grip. The back of the bottle is plain, with a subtle swirl pattern molded into the plastic. The cap is detached in the images, revealing a threaded neck for secure closure. The overall design is modern and compact, suitable for personal care use in urban environments.
description: A round, brown plastic lotion bottle with a black screw-on cap and a glossy, wood-textured finish. The front label is circular with white and gold text.
description_view_0: Front view showing the label, brand, and product name, with the cap removed and placed nearby.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bottle's flattened profile and the detached cap below.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the molded swirl pattern and the open neck of the bottle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bottle's curvature and the open neck.
